title: 开始菜单布局
have sth. done的几种用法
content:
have sth done

  1. (subject) ask someone to do something
    We had the machine repaired
  2. (subject) have done something
    They are going to have(=got) some trees planted.
  3. (subject) suffer unfortunate situation
    Yesterday I had my wallet stolen
  4. used in negative sentences, means “not allow”, “forbid”
    I would never have done what they did

title: that的几种用法
content:
‘that’ usage:

  1. used as pronoun
    examples:

    1. That’s my English teacher.
    2. Who told her that?
    3. What’s that which you have just stuffed into the plastic cup?
    4. The output of steel this year has increased by 20% compared with that in 1992.

  2. used as an adjective
    example:

    1. That book isn’t mine.

  3. used as an adverb
    example:

    1. Is the problem that easy?

  4. used as a conjunction
    a) introduce noun clause
    examples:
    I. He expressed that we would keep in touch with his firm.
    II. My idea is that we should act on his suggestion.
    b) introduce an adverbial clause to indicate reasons
    examples:
    I. we are glad that we have accomplished another arduous task.
    c) introduce adverbial clause to indicate purposes or results
    examples:
    I. He’s working hard that he can catch up with the class.

title: The difference between All & Whole
content:
The difference between All & Whole

  1. 定冠词的位置(after all, before whole)
    All the
    The whole
  2. all强调个体，whole强调整体
    all: everthing, one, etc.
    whole: complete, packet, group, container
  3. 不可数名词用all, whole常于可数名词单数一起用
    all the money, all the air (正确)
    the whole money, the whole air (错误)

一些例句：

The baby cried all the time
                         the whole time

all the time（always; cried, stop, cried, stop）:
—+++—++—-+++—-+++—++>
the whole time（non-stop）:
++++++++++++++++++++++++>


I studied all time day
              the whole day

All my friends came.
The whole group of my friends came.

All cities were destroyed.
所有的城市都被摧毁了
Whole cities were destroyed.
有些城市整个被摧毁了

All students need to come to class early tomorrow.
The whole class needs to come early tomorrow.

Quiz from EngVid

1.____ world is experiencing climate change.
A. All   B. The whole   C. The whole of   D. All of


2.Dan is having a party next weekend and he invited __ his classmates
A. all   B. whole   C. whole of   D. the all


3.That club was so much fun; we stayed until 3 A.M. and danced __ time.
A. all the   B. the all   C. whole the   D. the whole


4.I love that movie. I watch it ___ time.
A. whole   B. all the   C. always   D. the whole


5.When almost ____ the tickets were sold, the band decided to add another show to their tour.
A. the whole   B. the all   C. all   D. whole


6.I can’t go shopping this weekend because I spent __ my money on books.
A. all   B. whole   C. every   D. the whole


7.Although we don’t need _ members to contribute their time to the project,
we do need financial contributes from ____ group.
A. the whole   B. the all   C. all   D. whole
A. the whole   B. the all   C. all   D. whole


8.–What happened to the pizza?
–I ate it.
–__ it?

A. The whole   B. All   C. whole of   D. All of


9.–What happened to the pizza?
–I ate it.
–You didn’t save my any?
–Sorry, I ate _______ thing.

A. the whole   B. the all   C. all the   D. whole of   E. the whole of

答案:
  B A D B C A CA D A

title: 二进制小数
content:
十进制小数 to 二进制小数

##”乘2取整，顺序排列”法.
具体做法是：用2乘十进制小数，可以得到积，将积的整数部分取出，再用2乘余下的小数 部分，又得到一个积，再将积的整数部分取出，如此进行，直到积中的小数部分为零，或者达到所要求的精度为止。

然后把取出的整数部分按顺序排列起来，先取的整数作为二进制小数的高位有效位，后取的整数作为低位有效位。

例子：把173.8125（十进制）转成二进制
我们先把他分成 整数部分 和 小数部分，分别转成二进制，最后再合并。

整数部分的转换

小数部分的转换

最后合并
173.8125（十进制）＝10101101.1101（二进制）

二进制 to 十进制

按权相加法

1101.01(二进制) = (1 * 2^3) + (1 * 2^2) + (0 * 2^1) + (1 * 2^0) + (0 * 2^-1) + (1 * 1^-2 )
= 13.25(十进制)

参考:https://www.runoob.com/w3cnote/decimal-decimals-are-converted-to-binary-fractions.html

title: DNS服务器解析过程

content:
Edge有更低的内存占用，更流畅的动画，所以我抛弃了Firefox。

Edge has lower memory usage, smoother animation, therefor I abandoned firefox.
My attitude of the English teacher has been changed now.

I successfully connected to psiphon’s server on andriod.
So psiphon can work on Windows, IOS and andriod.
That is why you should not use browsers made in China.
选择我要的，不需要对的。

title: Discussing the teaching of English
content:
In this school term, we have changed an English teacher. She’s called Li Kun Lan. She’s young. I guess she has only taught 3 years(because she said she has taught a graduation class). so it means that our class is infused with fresh blood? Our last English teacher, Wei ZhengHui. He has taught for over 20 years. He has a rich teaching experience.

Wei said, “copying words is what primary school students do, now we are middle school students, we should use our brain to memory the words”. I quite agree with that.

but our present English teacher asks us to copy the words.

Wei also said, “The middle school student does not need to think about the grammar all day long, only college students study grammar”. I think so because what we learn now is simple, our brain can understand it, do not need to take notes. some grammar is hard to understand. that is when we need to memory in a different way or take notes.

but Li write the grammar on the blackboard every lesson, and always says terminologies. I am sure a lot of classmates do not understand what she is talking about.
Beyond borders

暑假都做了啥：

  1. 开发renge notepad
  2. 做了一个按时切壁纸程序
  3. 学计算机网络（未完成）
Why I am so excited when I connected to the psiphon.
I sometimes cannot distinguish between “except” and “expect”.
把你最爱的事，做到极致
